create-table-with-rows-and-cells.title: Create Table with Rows and Cells in PDF
create-table-with-rows-and-cells.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically build a table, add rows and cells, and insert it into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-into-pdf-page.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF Page
insert-table-into-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a Table, add header and data rows, and place it at a specific position on a chosen page of an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.title: AutoFit Table Columns to Content in PDF
auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table, enabling ColumnAdjustment.AutoFitToContent, and saving the document so column widths automatically adjust to the cell contents.

auto-fit-table-to-page-width.title: Auto‑Fit Table to Page Width in PDF
auto-fit-table-to-page-width.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with a table that automatically stretches to fill the page width using Aspose.Pdf's auto‑fit behavior.

insert-svg-image-into-pdf-table-cell.title: Insert SVG Image into PDF Table Cell
insert-svg-image-into-pdf-table-cell.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table, and place an SVG image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.title: Embed HTML Fragment in Table Cell
embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a table, and inserting an HtmlFragment with styled HTML markup into a cell's paragraph collection.

insert-page-break-after-table-row.title: Insert Page Break After Table Row in PDF
insert-page-break-after-table-row.description: Demonstrates how to force a specific table row onto a new page using the IsInNewPage property, creating a page break between rows in a PDF document.

create-table-on-new-pdf-page.title: Create a Table on a New PDF Page
create-table-on-new-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a new page to a PDF document and place a formatted table with header and data rows on that page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-table-columns-using-cell-colspan.title: Merge Table Columns Using Cell.ColSpan
merge-table-columns-using-cell-colspan.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and merging three adjacent columns into a single cell by setting the Cell.ColSpan property.

merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan
merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.description: Shows how to merge a table cell with the cell directly below by setting the Cell.RowSpan property in an Aspose.Pdf document.

set-custom-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.title: Set Custom Cell Margins in a PDF Table
set-custom-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to configure individual cell margins in an Aspose.Pdf table using a MarginInfo object and save the result as a PDF.

set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.title: Set Default Cell Padding for PDF Table
set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to apply uniform padding to all cells of a PDF table by assigning a MarginInfo instance to Table.DefaultCellPadding using Aspose.Pdf.

get-rendered-table-width.title: Get Rendered Table Width After Layout
get-rendered-table-width.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF, force layout by saving the document, and then read the calculated width of the rendered table using Aspose.Pdf.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to populate an Aspose.Pdf Table directly from an in‑memory DataTable using ImportDataTable, add the table to a PDF page, and save the document.

import-dataview-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataView into PDF Table
import-dataview-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to import a filtered DataView into an Aspose.Pdf Table using Table.ImportDataView and save the result as a PDF document.

create-pdf-table-from-datatable.title: Create PDF Table from a DataTable with Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-table-from-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to fill an in‑memory DataTable, import it into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and generate a PDF document containing the table.

determine-table-page-break-isbroken.title: Determine Table Page Break Using IsBroken
determine-table-page-break-isbroken.description: Loads a PDF, creates a table, adds it to a page, and checks the Table.IsBroken property to see if the table will be split across pages.

table-with-repeating-header-and-column.title: Create Table with Repeating Header Row and Column
table-with-repeating-header-and-column.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table, mark the first row as a header, and enable column repetition so the first column stays visible on each new page when the table splits.

extract-tables-from-pdf.title: Extract Tables from PDF using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate and iterate through tables, rows, and cells in a PDF document and retrieve their text content.

replace-table-in-pdf.title: Replace Existing Table with a New Table in a PDF
replace-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates locating tables with TableAbsorber, creating a new Table, and replacing each absorbed table while keeping its original position in the document.

remove-table-from-pdf.title: Remove a Table from PDF with TableAbsorber
remove-table-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate the first table in a PDF using TableAbsorber and delete it with the Remove method, then save the modified document.

remove-all-tables-from-pdf.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF Document
remove-all-tables-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate every table in a PDF using TableAbsorber and delete them from the document.

batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table with Company Logo to PDFs
batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, insert a table containing a company logo image onto each document's first page, and save the modified PDFs to an output folder.

batch-replace-tables-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
batch-replace-tables-in-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, locate each table with TableAbsorber, and replace them with a new Table using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-different-autofit-behavior-to-tabl.title: Apply Different AutoFitBehavior Settings to Tables in a PDF
apply-different-autofit-behavior-to-tabl.description: Demonstrates how to add multiple tables to a PDF and set distinct ColumnAdjustment (AutoFitToContent and AutoFitToWindow) for each table.

add-background-color-to-table-cell.title: Add Background Color to a Table Cell in PDF
add-background-color-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to set the BackgroundColor property of a table cell using Aspose.Pdf to color a cell within a PDF table.

apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Solid Border to PDF Table
apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.description: Creates a PDF document containing a table and applies a solid black border around the entire table using the Table.Border and BorderInfo properties.

insert-external-image-into-pdf-table-cel.title: Insert External Image into PDF Table Cell
insert-external-image-into-pdf-table-cel.description: Demonstrates how to load an external image file and place it inside a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-image-into-pdf-table-cell.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into PDF Table Cell
insert-image-into-pdf-table-cell.description: Shows how to load an image from a memory stream and embed it into a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-styled-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Styled Text to Table Cell in PDF
add-styled-text-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to insert text with a specific font and size into a PDF table cell using a TextFragment and overriding the cell's text state.

add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.title: Add Centered Paragraph to Table Cell
add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a table, and places a horizontally centered paragraph inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.title: Set Cell Vertical Alignment to Middle in PDF Table
set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and set a cell's vertical alignment to the middle (center) before saving the document.

center-align-table.title: Center Align Table in PDF
center-align-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a table and set its HorizontalAlignment to Center using Aspose.Pdf.

offset-table-left-margin.title: Offset Table from Left Margin in PDF
offset-table-left-margin.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a table, and shifting it from the left page margin by setting Table.Margin.Left to a specific point value.

enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.title: Enable Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to allow a table to break across multiple PDF pages by setting Table.IsBroken to true and populating enough rows to span several pages.

prevent-table-splitting.title: Prevent Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
prevent-table-splitting.description: Demonstrates how to keep an Aspose.Pdf.Table on a single page by setting Table.IsBroken to false, even when the content exceeds the page height.

calculate-remaining-page-height-add-tabl.title: Calculate Remaining Page Height and Insert Table
calculate-remaining-page-height-add-tabl.description: Demonstrates how to compute the usable vertical space on a PDF page by subtracting margins and existing content, then creates and adds a table that fits within the remaining area.

create-fixed-width-table.title: Create Fixed-Width Table in PDF
create-fixed-width-table.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a table whose total width is fixed to 500 points and optionally centered on the page.

set-table-width-80-percent.title: Set Table Width to 80% of Page
set-table-width-80-percent.description: Shows how to define a table's width as a percentage of the page width using Aspose.Pdf and save the resulting PDF.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.title: Map DataTable Columns to Specific PDF Table Columns
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to map selected DataTable columns to arbitrary positions in an Aspose.Pdf Table using a column‑mapping dictionary and the ImportDataTable method.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to filter rows in a DataView and import the filtered data into an Aspose.Pdf Table, then save the result as a PDF document.

populate-pdf-table-from-linq-query.title: Populate PDF Table from LINQ Query using Aspose.Pdf
populate-pdf-table-from-linq-query.description: Demonstrates converting a LINQ query result into a DataTable, importing it into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and saving the table in a PDF document.

add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing a target page, creating a formatted table, and inserting it onto that page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph.title: Insert Table After Specific Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to locate a paragraph containing a marker text in a PDF, create a simple 2x2 table, and insert the table immediately after that paragraph using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-before-image.title: Insert Table Before an Image in a Tagged PDF
insert-table-before-image.description: Shows how to locate an image (FigureElement) in a tagged PDF's structure tree and insert a new TableElement with header and data rows before that image.

create-table-with-repeating-header.title: Create Table with Repeating Header in PDF
create-table-with-repeating-header.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to build a table whose header row repeats automatically on each new page of the PDF.

style-table-header-row.title: Style Table Header Row in PDF
style-table-header-row.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table and apply a distinct background color and bold font to the header cells using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-row-to-pdf-table.title: Add Footer Row to PDF Table with Tagged Structure
add-footer-row-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table footer (TFoot) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, attach it to the tagged PDF structure, and have it repeat at the bottom of each page.

alternating-row-colors-pdf-table.title: Apply Alternating Row Colors to PDF Table
alternating-row-colors-pdf-table.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a table, populate rows and cells, and set alternating background colors for rows based on their index.

add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to make a table cell clickable by calculating its rectangle and attaching a LinkAnnotation that opens an external URL.

add-checkbox-in-table-cell.title: Add Checkbox Form Field Inside a Table Cell
add-checkbox-in-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a CheckboxField, calculate its position within a table cell, and add it to the PDF form collection.

export-pdf-table-structure-to-json.title: Export PDF Table Structure to JSON
export-pdf-table-structure-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's tagged table elements, extract row and cell metadata, and serialize the structure to a JSON file.

export-pdf-to-csv.title: Export PDF to CSV using Aspose.Pdf
export-pdf-to-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and saving its table data as a CSV file using ExcelSaveOptions.

serialize-table-to-xml.title: Serialize Table to XML in PDF Document
serialize-table-to-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table using Aspose.Pdf and then serialize the entire document, including the table structure, to an XML file.

render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render Table from XML Definition to PDF
render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF table definition stored in an XML file, reconstructs the Table object in memory, and saves the rendered PDF document.

count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.title: Count Tables in PDF Using TableAbsorber
count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.description: Shows how to employ Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF and retrieve the total count via the TableList collection.

extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF
extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, detect tables with TableAbsorber, and retrieve the rectangle coordinates of each detected table.

extract-text-from-pdf-tables.title: Extract Text from PDF Tables using TableAbsorber
extract-text-from-pdf-tables.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables, and retrieve the concatenated text from each cell.

replace-table-cell-text-by-keyword.title: Replace Table Cell Text by Keyword in PDF
replace-table-cell-text-by-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to locate PDF table cells containing a specific keyword and replace the cell text using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and TextFragment classes.

remove-column-from-pdf-table.title: Remove a Column from a PDF Table
remove-column-from-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific column from an Aspose.Pdf Table by removing the corresponding Cell objects from each Row and saving the updated PDF.

insert-column-into-pdf-table.title: Insert Column into PDF Table
insert-column-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to add a new column to an existing table in a PDF by inserting an empty cell at a specified index in each row using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.title: Reorder Table Columns in PDF
reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract tables from a PDF, rebuild each row with a custom column order, and replace the original table using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-table-column-widths.title: Adjust Table Column Widths Proportionally in PDF
adjust-table-column-widths.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first table, calculates each column's width as a percentage of the total width, and updates the table to use these proportional widths with auto‑fit mode.

set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-tables.title: Set Minimum Column Width for PDF Tables
set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to enforce a minimum column width for tables in a PDF by setting the Table.DefaultColumnWidth property while iterating through pages with Aspose.Pdf.

set-maximum-column-widths-for-pdf-table.title: Set Maximum Column Widths for PDF Table
set-maximum-column-widths-for-pdf-table.description: Shows how to limit the width of table columns in a PDF by setting the ColumnWidths and DefaultColumnWidth properties using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.title: Add Auto‑Numbered Column to PDF Table
add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and insert sequential numbers into the first column of each row.

set-table-background-color.title: Set Semi-Transparent Background Color for PDF Table
set-table-background-color.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a table, and applying a background color with opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-gradient-background-behind-table.title: Add Gradient Background Behind a Table
add-gradient-background-behind-table.description: Demonstrates how to simulate a gradient background for a table by drawing a rectangle on a Graph and positioning the table on top using Aspose.Pdf.

set-table-z-index-pdf.title: Set Table Z-Index in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
set-table-z-index-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a table, position it on a PDF page, and control its overlapping order by setting the Z‑index using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-into-textbox-field.title: Insert a Table into a TextBox Form Field
insert-table-into-textbox-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextBox form field, build a tagged table structure, and embed the table as the field's appearance in an existing PDF.

insert-table-after-paragraph__v2.title: Insert Table After a Paragraph in a PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph__v2.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a text fragment, building a table, and inserting the table into the page's paragraph collection right after the text.

import-datatable-images-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable Images into a PDF Table
import-datatable-images-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates loading image byte arrays from a DataTable and rendering them as images inside a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

render-table-high-dpi-images.title: Render Table with High‑DPI Images in PDF and HTML
render-table-high-dpi-images.description: Shows how to create a table containing images and export the document to PDF and HTML with high‑resolution images by configuring ImageResolution in HtmlSaveOptions.

generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.title: Generate PDF Report with Multiple Tables from Different DataSources
generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding separate pages, and inserting tables that are populated from in‑memory DataTables representing different databases.

create-pdf-table-from-datatable__v2.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count from DataTable
create-pdf-table-from-datatable__v2.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, build a DataTable with a variable number of rows, import it into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, and add the table to a PDF page.

conditional-formatting-table-cells.title: Conditional Formatting of PDF Table Cells
conditional-formatting-table-cells.description: Shows how to change the background color of table cells in a PDF based on numeric thresholds using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-text-in-table-cell.title: Rotate Text Inside a Table Cell
rotate-text-in-table-cell.description: Shows how to rotate text within a PDF table cell by setting the TextFragment's rotation angle and adding it to the cell before saving the document.

render-rotated-table-pdf.title: Render a Table Rotated 90 Degrees in PDF
render-rotated-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to rotate an entire table by 90° using a transformation matrix (GSave, ConcatenateMatrix, GRestore) before adding it to a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables using TableAbsorber
detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.description: Loads a PDF, extracts tables with TableAbsorber, and identifies cells that span multiple rows or columns by checking RowSpan and ColSpan values.

split-merged-table-cells.title: Split Merged Table Cells into Separate Cells in PDF
split-merged-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to detect merged cells in a PDF table, split them into individual cells, and replace the original table using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footnote-references-in-pdf-table.title: Add Footnote References with Links in PDF Table
add-footnote-references-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates creating a table in a PDF, inserting superscript footnote markers in cells, adding footnote paragraphs on a separate page, and linking the markers to the footnotes using link annotations.

insert-table-at-specific-position.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
insert-table-at-specific-position.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table, set its absolute X/Y coordinates using MarginInfo, add it to a page, and save the result.

right-align-table-pdf.title: Right Align Table in PDF
right-align-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to align a table to the right margin of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the table's Alignment property and adjusting its left coordinate.

set-table-border-thickness-2-points.title: Set Table Border Thickness to 2 Points
set-table-border-thickness-2-points.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF document and configure its border width to 2 points using Aspose.Pdf.

create-table-double-border.title: Create Table with Double Border in PDF
create-table-double-border.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document containing a table and apply a double‑style border by configuring BorderInfo with a thicker width.

add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Multiline Text to a Table Cell
add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF table cell containing multiline text by inserting several TextFragment objects separated by line‑break fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

add-numbered-list-in-table-cell.title: Add Numbered List Inside Table Cell
add-numbered-list-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to create a table with a single cell and insert a numbered list into that cell using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV with TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF document and export each table as a CSV file, handling cell text and CSV escaping.

extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.title: Extract PDF Tables to DataTable with TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, extract cell text, and populate a System.Data.DataTable for further processing.

set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Set Custom Row Height in PDF Table
set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table using Aspose.Pdf and assign a fixed height to a specific row.

auto-fit-table-row-height.title: Auto-Fit Table Row Height in PDF
auto-fit-table-row-height.description: Demonstrates how to enable automatic height adjustment for a table row (auto‑fit) using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

set-fixed-row-height-table-rows.title: Set Fixed Row Height for Table Rows in PDF
set-fixed-row-height-table-rows.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF and enforce a uniform row height by configuring the FixedRowHeight property for each row before adding content.

landscape-pdf-with-wide-table.title: Create Landscape PDF with Wide Table
landscape-pdf-with-wide-table.description: Shows how to set a PDF page to landscape orientation and add a wide table that fits within the page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-page-add-table.title: Rotate PDF Page and Insert a Table
rotate-page-add-table.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page 90° clockwise and then add a formatted table to the rotated page using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-tables-from-rotated-pdf-pages.title: Extract Tables from Rotated PDF Pages
extract-tables-from-rotated-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to detect rotated pages in a PDF and use TableAbsorber to locate and read tables on those pages.

remove-tables-containing-keyword.title: Remove Tables Containing a Keyword from PDF
remove-tables-containing-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to locate tables in a PDF, scan each cell for a specific keyword, and delete any tables that contain the keyword.
